title: Sālār Heavy Rain
lead: Sālār is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of +3.34. The Score is 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Sālār is causing significant disruptions. 
 The high humidity of 90% and moderate wind speed of 13.3 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The CDD of 10.7 GG and zero HDD indicate a severe weather anomaly.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
